summary: Restructure the mobile UI to replace the object creation panel with role-specific minimal bars: PMs get photo upload for selected objects, while Technicians get only a status-color toggle in a preview-only mode.

plan.title: Research Role and Mobile Component Usage
plan.description: Examine `client/src/pages/home.tsx`, `client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx`, and `client/src/components/editor/MobileAddObjectPanel.tsx` to identify how roles are accessed and where the 'Add Object' UI is triggered.

plan.title: Remove Mobile Object Creation UI
plan.description: Hide or remove the `MobileAddObjectPanel` and its associated 'plus' buttons from the mobile view in `home.tsx` and `Toolbar.tsx`.

plan.title: Implement Role-Based Mobile Bottom Bar
plan.description: Refactor `MobileBottomBar.tsx` to: 1. If user is PM, show only a photo upload button (enabled when an object is selected). 2. If user is TECH, show only the 'Color by status' checkbox/toggle. Remove all sliding menu logic.

plan.title: Enforce Technician Preview Mode
plan.description: Ensure that on mobile, users with the Technician role cannot move, resize, or delete objects, effectively making it a preview-only mode as requested.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mobile view does not contain any '+' buttons or 'Add Object' menus.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Visual inspection of `client/src/pages/home.tsx` and `client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx` for conditional rendering based on `isMobile`.

acceptance_criteria.description: For PM role on mobile, `MobileBottomBar` renders a button to add photos to a selected object.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check `MobileBottomBar.tsx` for `role === 'admin'` or `'manager'` logic rendering `ObjectPhotoGallery` or a direct upload trigger.

acceptance_criteria.description: For TECH role on mobile, `MobileBottomBar` renders only a checkbox/switch for 'Color by status'.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check `MobileBottomBar.tsx` for `role === 'technician'` logic rendering the `Checkbox` for status colors.

acceptance_criteria.description: Mobile Bottom Bar does not expand/slide upwards.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify `MobileBottomBar.tsx` does not use `Drawer` or height-expanding animations/states.

acceptance_criteria.description: Technicians cannot drag or resize objects on mobile.
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Check `ObjectRenderer.tsx` for `disableDragging` and `enableResizing={false}` props on the `Rnd` component when user is a technician and on mobile.

risks: Frontend role detection may rely on `useCurrentUser()` which might return null if the session is strictly technician-name based (trust-based).
Removing the 'Add' functionality on mobile might block PMs who occasionally need to fix/add things on site if they aren't near a desktop.
The 'Color by status' toggle might require a global state change that needs to be properly synced with the UIContext.
